name: corduroy
description: Corduroy Intelligence plugin marketplace — domain-scoped workflow agents, vertical skill bundles, and shared admin tooling for Claude Code and Cowork.

plugins.name: financial-analysis
plugins.description: Core financial modeling and analysis tools: DCF, comps, LBO, 3-statement models, competitive analysis, and deck QC.

plugins.name: investment-banking
plugins.description: Investment banking productivity tools — client and market insights, deck creation, financial analysis, and transaction management.

plugins.name: equity-research
plugins.description: Equity research tools: earnings analysis, initiating coverage reports, and research workflows.

plugins.name: private-equity
plugins.description: Private equity deal sourcing and workflow tools: company discovery, CRM integration, and founder outreach.

plugins.name: wealth-management
plugins.description: Wealth management and financial advisory tools: client reviews, financial planning, portfolio analysis, and client reporting.

plugins.name: fund-admin
plugins.description: Fund administration and finance ops: GL reconciliation, break tracing, accruals, roll-forwards, variance commentary, NAV tie-out.

plugins.name: operations
plugins.description: Operational workflows: KYC document parsing and rules-grid evaluation.

plugins.name: pitch-agent
plugins.description: Comps, precedents, LBO to a branded pitch deck, end to end.

plugins.name: market-researcher
plugins.description: Sector or theme to industry overview, competitive landscape, peer comps, and ideas shortlist.

plugins.name: earnings-reviewer
plugins.description: Earnings call and filings to model update to note draft.

plugins.name: meeting-prep-agent
plugins.description: Briefing pack before every client meeting.

plugins.name: model-builder
plugins.description: DCF, LBO, 3-statement, comps — live in Excel.

plugins.name: gl-reconciler
plugins.description: Finds breaks, traces root cause, routes for sign-off.

plugins.name: kyc-screener
plugins.description: Parses onboarding docs, runs the rules engine, flags gaps.

plugins.name: valuation-reviewer
plugins.description: Ingests GP packages, runs valuation template, stages LP reporting.

plugins.name: statement-auditor
plugins.description: Audits pre-generated LP statements before distribution.

plugins.name: claude-for-msft-365-install
plugins.description: Provision direct cloud access (Vertex AI, Bedrock, or LLM gateway) for the Claude Microsoft 365 add-in. Generates the customized manifest, walks through Azure admin consent, and writes per-user config via Graph extension attributes.
